ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "instnm" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "stabbr" TEXT /* State abbreviation of the institution */,
  "hbcu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution is a Historically Black College or University (HBCU) */,
  "menonly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution is men-only */,
  "womenonly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution is women-only */,
  "relaffil" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution has a religious affiliation */,
  "satvrmid" INTEGER /* Median SAT verbal score of admitted students */,
  "satmtmid" INTEGER /* Median SAT math score of admitted students */,
  "distanceonly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution offers only distance education */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the institution's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the institution's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "ugds_2mor" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students aged 25 or older */,
  "ugds_nra" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students who are non-resident aliens */,
  "ugds_unkn" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students with unknown race/ethnicity */,
  "pptug_ef" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students who are first-generation college students */,
  "curroper" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution is currently operating */,
  "pctpell" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students receiving Pell Grants */,
  "pctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students receiving federal student loans */,
  "ug25abv" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students aged 25 or older */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of race and ethnicity */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of student ages */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Detailed distribution of genders */,
  "international_students_by_country" TEXT /* Breakdown of international students by country */,
  "first_generation_college_students" REAL /* Detailed breakdown of first-generation college students */,
  "veteran_status" REAL /* Percentage of students who are veterans */,
  "disability_status" REAL /* Percentage of students with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "pctpell" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students receiving Pell Grants */,
  "pctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of undergraduate students receiving federal student loans */,
  "grad_debt_mdn_supp" INTEGER /* Median student debt at graduation */,
  "average_pell_grant_amount" REAL /* Average amount of Pell Grants received */,
  "average_federal_loan_amount" REAL /* Average amount of federal student loans received */,
  "private_loan_recipients" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving private loans */,
  "work_study_participation" REAL /* Percentage of students participating in work-study programs */,
  "grant_types" TEXT /* Types of grants available at the institution */,
  "loan_repayment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who are repaying their loans on time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "satvrmid" INTEGER /* Median SAT verbal score of admitted students */,
  "satmtmid" INTEGER /* Median SAT math score of admitted students */,
  "md_earn_wne_p10" INTEGER /* Median earnings 10 years after entry for students who completed a program */,
  "graduation_rate_4yr" REAL /* 4-year graduation rate */,
  "graduation_rate_6yr" REAL /* 6-year graduation rate */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Student retention rate */,
  "transfer_rate" REAL /* Student transfer rate */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  "graduation_rate_by_major" TEXT /* Graduation rates by major */,
  "average_time_to_degree" REAL /* Average time to complete a degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_finances" (
  "fin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "md_earn_wne_p10" INTEGER /* Median earnings 10 years after entry for students who completed a program */,
  "grad_debt_mdn_supp" INTEGER /* Median student debt at graduation */,
  "revenue_sources" TEXT /* Breakdown of revenue sources */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Breakdown of expenses */,
  "net_assets" REAL /* Net assets of the institution */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "debt_ratio" REAL /* Debt ratio */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the institution */,
  "enrollment_trends" TEXT /* Trends in enrollment over the past few years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_finances_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, student) */,
  "institution_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation with an institution (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data or reports viewed */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Specific data or reports downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dataset updates */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the dataset */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the dataset */,
  "data_licensing" TEXT /* Licensing information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
